## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss Homebase company overview, brand positioning, and content strategy for upcoming projects.](https://fathom.video/share/ot7VzsyDPxcYyRtzhA2dsedzhyhn6Apq?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Homebase is repositioning as the "everything app for hourly teams", with a strong focus on payroll services](https://fathom.video/share/ot7VzsyDPxcYyRtzhA2dsedzhyhn6Apq?tab=summary&timestamp=223.0)
  - [Content strategy shifting to prioritize glossary content (15 pieces) by mid-February](https://fathom.video/share/ot7VzsyDPxcYyRtzhA2dsedzhyhn6Apq?tab=summary&timestamp=434.0)
  - [AI-generated content needs refinement in tone, structure, and inclusion of "why" behind information](https://fathom.video/share/ot7VzsyDPxcYyRtzhA2dsedzhyhn6Apq?tab=summary&timestamp=1312.0)
  - [Team to recalibrate company brief and personas to align with current positioning](https://fathom.video/share/ot7VzsyDPxcYyRtzhA2dsedzhyhn6Apq?tab=summary&timestamp=1068.0)

## Topics

### Homebase Product Overview

  - [Core offering: Team management app for hourly workers (scheduling, time tracking, hiring, onboarding)](https://fathom.video/share/ot7VzsyDPxcYyRtzhA2dsedzhyhn6Apq?tab=summary&timestamp=266.0)
  - [Key verticals: Food & beverage, retail (primary); services, hospitality (secondary)](https://fathom.video/share/ot7VzsyDPxcYyRtzhA2dsedzhyhn6Apq?tab=summary&timestamp=243.0)
  - [Pricing model: Freemium with paid add-ons (e.g., payroll, tip management, background checks)](https://fathom.video/share/ot7VzsyDPxcYyRtzhA2dsedzhyhn6Apq?tab=summary&timestamp=562.0)
  - [Future focus: Expanding payroll services as a key growth area](https://fathom.video/share/ot7VzsyDPxcYyRtzhA2dsedzhyhn6Apq?tab=summary&timestamp=434.0)

### Content Strategy and Positioning

  - [Shift from pure readership metrics to "community experience" focus](https://fathom.video/share/ot7VzsyDPxcYyRtzhA2dsedzhyhn6Apq?tab=summary&timestamp=1458.0)
  - [Content funnel model: Pink Cloud (audience-relevant, non-product) → Top of Funnel → Middle of Funnel → Bottom of Funnel](https://fathom.video/share/ot7VzsyDPxcYyRtzhA2dsedzhyhn6Apq?tab=summary&timestamp=1479.0)
  - [Need-pain buckets: Team turnover, payroll simplification, team engagement, scheduling ease, communication efficiency](https://fathom.video/share/ot7VzsyDPxcYyRtzhA2dsedzhyhn6Apq?tab=summary&timestamp=1808.0)
  - [AI content generation challenges: Incorporating "why" behind information, maintaining brand voice](https://fathom.video/share/ot7VzsyDPxcYyRtzhA2dsedzhyhn6Apq?tab=summary&timestamp=1312.0)

### Upcoming Content Projects

  - [Glossary content prioritized (15 pieces by mid-February)](https://fathom.video/share/ot7VzsyDPxcYyRtzhA2dsedzhyhn6Apq?tab=summary&timestamp=2613.0)
  - [Programmatic SEO project delayed for site structure planning](https://fathom.video/share/ot7VzsyDPxcYyRtzhA2dsedzhyhn6Apq?tab=summary&timestamp=2619.0)
  - [Content length guideline adjusted to 700-1400 words, flexible based on topic](https://fathom.video/share/ot7VzsyDPxcYyRtzhA2dsedzhyhn6Apq?tab=summary&timestamp=2408.0)

### Brand Voice and Style

  - [Aim for friendly, approachable tone without overusing analogies](https://fathom.video/share/ot7VzsyDPxcYyRtzhA2dsedzhyhn6Apq?tab=summary&timestamp=2520.0)
  - [Maintain technical accuracy while incorporating brand personality](https://fathom.video/share/ot7VzsyDPxcYyRtzhA2dsedzhyhn6Apq?tab=summary&timestamp=2464.0)
  - [Team to refine AI-generated content to better match desired tone and structure](https://fathom.video/share/ot7VzsyDPxcYyRtzhA2dsedzhyhn6Apq?tab=summary&timestamp=2537.0)

## Next Steps

  - [fwd.digital team to rerun company brief with updated information](https://fathom.video/share/ot7VzsyDPxcYyRtzhA2dsedzhyhn6Apq?tab=summary&timestamp=1068.0)
  - [Kerry to have Victoria review content structure and provide detailed feedback](https://fathom.video/share/ot7VzsyDPxcYyRtzhA2dsedzhyhn6Apq?tab=summary&timestamp=2382.0)
  - [fwd.digital to prepare two keyword lists for approval](https://fathom.video/share/ot7VzsyDPxcYyRtzhA2dsedzhyhn6Apq?tab=summary&timestamp=2580.0)
  - [Team to finalize content structure and tone guidelines for glossary project](https://fathom.video/share/ot7VzsyDPxcYyRtzhA2dsedzhyhn6Apq?tab=summary&timestamp=2560.0)
  - [Sedira to provide access to image creation tools for content visuals](https://fathom.video/share/ot7VzsyDPxcYyRtzhA2dsedzhyhn6Apq?tab=summary&timestamp=2685.0)
